model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401896226). 14/22 player embeddings matched, ASYMMETRIC: Rijeka (home) 5/11, Derry City (away) 9/11.

bets.staking_method: Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula gave EUR14; downsized to roughly 1/3 formula size (EUR4) given Rijeka's own confirmed XI matched only 5/11 embeddings and the market's 87% implied favorite price is a large gap versus our 48.5% -- edge only partially trusted.
Same downsized tier as the draw leg (Rijeka's own data only 5/11 matched) -- taken at EUR5, close to the earlier EUR5 recommendation for this leg.

excluded_legs_note: Home win (Rijeka, -38.4pp edge, -44.2% EV) excluded as a clear no-bet.
data_note: 14/22 embeddings, asymmetric 5/11 (Rijeka) vs 9/11 (Derry City) -- both legs downsized well below full formula on that basis.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs; bet placed at Unibet ahead of the 18:45Z kickoff; this commit logged before kickoff, before any result information -- match has not yet been played.
settlement_note: Both legs lost -- Rijeka won 1-0 at home (draw leg and away-win leg both settle as losses). Settled via ESPN scoreboard (event 401896226, STATUS_FULL_TIME).
